positive: Minimalist abstract celestial sphere featuring a crescent moon, constellations, and swirling nebulae rendered in deep indigo and metallic gold leaf accents. The design should be highly contrasted, utilizing negative space effectively. Composition must be centralized, suitable for chest placement on apparel, with smooth, clean linework. Style: Art Nouveau meeting modern geometric abstraction. Lighting: High contrast, ethereal glow emanating from the nebula areas. Print-friendly details: Single color breakdown for screen printing (gold and indigo tones), solid areas and clear separation lines.
